paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently 6.32, representing a decrease of 3.95% from the prior close and 27.27% over the last 22 sessions. The price is as of 2026-07-23.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, dated 2026-07-23. This news item is the most recent, and its summary mentions the company's focus on developing AI-datacenter power.

The company has 25 total filings in its feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes, and other 8-K forms related to the resignation and financing transactions.
